index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Survival</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#0a1a0a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c" width="600" height="400"></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=400;
let player,enemies,particles,score,hp,wave,waveTimer,waveCooldown,keys,dead,attackTimer,attackActive;
function init(){
  player={x:300,y:200};
  enemies=[];particles=[];
  score=0;hp=10;wave=1;waveTimer=0;waveCooldown=180;
  keys={};dead=false;attackTimer=0;attackActive=false;
  spawnWave();
}
function spawnWave(){
  const count=4+wave*2;
  for(let i=0;i<count;i++){
    let x,y;
    const side=Math.floor(Math.random()*4);
    if(side===0){x=Math.random()*W;y=-20;}
    else if(side===1){x=W+20;y=Math.random()*H;}
    else if(side===2){x=Math.random()*W;y=H+20;}
    else{x=-20;y=Math.random()*H;}
    enemies.push({x,y,hp:1+Math.floor(wave/3),maxhp:1+Math.floor(wave/3),vx:0,vy:0});
  }
  waveTimer=0;
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
  keys[e.key]=true;
  if(e.key===' '){e.preventDefault();if(!attackActive&&attackTimer<=0){attackActive=true;attackTimer=20;}}
});
document.addEventListener('keyup',e=>{keys[e.key]=false;});
cv.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  if(!attackActive&&attackTimer<=0){attackActive=true;attackTimer=20;}
});
function update(){
  if(dead)return;
  const spd=3;
  if(keys['w']||keys['ArrowUp'])player.y=Math.max(16,player.y-spd);
  if(keys['s']||keys['ArrowDown'])player.y=Math.min(H-16,player.y+spd);
  if(keys['a']||keys['ArrowLeft'])player.x=Math.max(16,player.x-spd);
  if(keys['d']||keys['ArrowRight'])player.x=Math.min(W-16,player.x+spd);
  if(attackTimer>0)attackTimer--;
  if(attackTimer===0)attackActive=false;
  const swordRange=60;
  enemies=enemies.filter(e=>{
    const dx=player.x-e.x,dy=player.y-e.y;
    const dist=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)||1;
    const spd2=0.8+wave*0.1;
    e.x+=dx/dist*spd2;e.y+=dy/dist*spd2;
    if(attackActive){
      if(dist<swordRange){e.hp--;if(e.hp<=0){score++;for(let i=0;i<8;i++){const a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;particles.push({x:e.x,y:e.y,vx:Math.cos(a)*3,vy:Math.sin(a)*3,life:20});}return false;}
      }
    }
    if(dist<16){hp--;if(hp<=0){dead=true;}e.x-=dx/dist*4;e.y-=dy/dist*4;}
    return true;
  });
  particles=particles.filter(p=>{p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vx*=0.9;p.vy*=0.9;p.life--;return p.life>0;});
  waveTimer++;
  if(enemies.length===0&&waveTimer>60){
    wave++;waveCooldown=120;spawnWave();
  }
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#0d1a0d';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  for(let gx=0;gx<W;gx+=40)for(let gy=0;gy<H;gy+=40){
    ctx.fillStyle=(gx/40+gy/40)%2===0?'#0f1f0f':'#111a11';
    ctx.fillRect(gx,gy,40,40);
  }
  enemies.forEach(e=>{
    const dx=player.x-e.x,dy=player.y-e.y;
    const dist=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)||1;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4caf50';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(e.x,e.y,10,8,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#1b5e20';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x-4,e.y-4,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x+4,e.y-4,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x-4,e.y-4,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x+4,e.y-4,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    if(e.maxhp>1){
      ctx.fillStyle='#333';ctx.fillRect(e.x-12,e.y-18,24,4);
      ctx.fillStyle='#f44336';ctx.fillRect(e.x-12,e.y-18,24*e.hp/e.maxhp,4);
    }
  });
  if(attackActive){
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha=0.35;
    ctx.fillStyle='#ffeb3b';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(player.x,player.y,60,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
    ctx.save();
    ctx.strokeStyle='#ffd600';ctx.lineWidth=3;
    ctx.shadowColor='#ffd600';ctx.shadowBlur=15;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(player.x,player.y);
    ctx.lineTo(player.x+55,player.y-30);
    ctx.stroke();
    ctx.restore();
  }
  ctx.fillStyle='#e64a19';
  ctx.fillRect(player.x-8,player.y-14,16,16);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffcc02';
  ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(player.x,player.y-20,9,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  ctx.fillStyle='#37474f';
  ctx.fillRect(player.x-6,player.y+2,4,8);
  ctx.fillRect(player.x+2,player.y+2,4,8);
  particles.forEach(p=>{
    ctx.globalAlpha=p.life/20;
    ctx.fillStyle='#4caf50';
    ctx.fillRect(p.x-2,p.y-2,4,4);
  });
  ctx.globalAlpha=1;
  ctx.fillStyle='#333';ctx.fillRect(10,10,120,14);
  ctx.fillStyle='#f44336';ctx.fillRect(10,10,120*hp/10,14);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='10px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('HP',14,21);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';
  ctx.fillText('Kills: '+score,10,42);
  ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Wave '+wave,590,20);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.font='11px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('WASD move  SPACE or Click = sword',300,395);
  const atkCd=attackActive?1:Math.max(0,(20-attackTimer)/20);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.15)';ctx.fillRect(W/2-40,H-18,80,8);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffd600';ctx.fillRect(W/2-40,H-18,80*atkCd,8);
  if(dead){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.75)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#f44336';ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',W/2,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='24px monospace';ctx.fillText('Kills: '+score,W/2,240);
    ctx.fillText('Wave: '+wave,W/2,275);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='16px monospace';ctx.fillText('Reload to play again',W/2,320);
  }
}
function loop(){update();draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
